rows.label: tev999901_SEL0031
rows.name: This BLADE operative is standing by for orders.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev999901_MSG0001
rows.name: Is this some sort of sign?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev999901_MSG0101
rows.name:
We'll be the best of friends
and the archest of enemies.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev999901_MSG2001
rows.name:
Consider the contract signed. Let
my Union handle the support.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev999901_MSG2101
rows.name:
As per our vow, my Union will
continue transcending time
and space to back you up![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev999901_MSG3001
rows.name:
Are you saying you want to
sign a contract with me?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev999901_MSG3102
rows.name:
Our partnership has been written in the
stars since the day this world was born.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev999901_MSG5001
rows.name:
I'm heightening my aura powers to
the limit. Don't talk to me now![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev999901_MSG5101
rows.name:
Can't you hear the voice from on high?
It's saying, "Don't bother him now!"[ST:wait ]
